headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Looks Fully Valued Following Fresh AI Demand News
summary: Lam Research stock has delivered a very large 5 year return of 634%, yet its current valuation checks flag the shares as expensive rather than a clear bargain. A roughly 6.3x gain over five years suggests Lam Research has already priced in a lot of optimism about its role in AI driven semiconductor spending. Recent enthusiasm around increased wafer fabrication equipment demand can support high expectations, while concerns about rich multiples and insider selling keep valuation risk firmly on...
